description: This pipeline exports a results table to CSV/XLSX and then outputs the exported file. The main steps involve exporting the table, and then outputting the file.

79bbb6b6-bd46-40d1-bd61-b15996e6796d.name: iji-export-table-v2
79bbb6b6-bd46-40d1-bd61-b15996e6796d.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
